mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM tb_user WHERE hp_no = #{hpNo} AND user_name=#{userName} AND now() BETWEEN str_date AND COALESCE(end_date, '2999-12-31') AND use_flag = TRUE

SELECT passwd , user_id, user_seq FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND hp_no = #{hpNo} AND user_name=#{userName} AND now() BETWEEN str_date AND COALESCE(end_date, '2999-12-31') AND use_flag = TRUE
